message:
refactor(tools): migrate HashlineEditTool from std::fs to asupersync::fs async

HashlineEditTool previously used blocking std::fs::metadata,
std::fs::File::open, and synchronous read_to_string for file I/O.
This migrates to asupersync::fs equivalents (async metadata, File::open,
read_to_end) so the tool no longer blocks the async runtime during
file reads.

Also switches from read_to_string to read_to_end + explicit UTF-8
validation via String::from_utf8, which produces a clearer error
message ("File contains invalid UTF-8 characters and cannot be safely
edited as text") instead of a generic I/O error when encountering
binary files.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
